name: Serverless API
description: Serverless API for Contrast serverless applications. Scan cloud resources, discover vulnerabilities, and protect your serverless accounts. For more information, explanation, and definitions, see product documentation: [Contrast Security Serverless.](#https://docs.contrastsecurity.com/en/get-started-with-serverless.html)
